name: miro
description: Miro whiteboard board + item operations as MCP tools.

fields.name: MIRO_ACCESS_TOKEN
fields.label: Miro access token
instructions: Your browser will open the Miro user-profile apps page.
1. If your team already has a 'mcp-bridge' app installed, click it and copy the access token. Done.
4. Under Permissions, select at minimum: boards:read, boards:write.
5. Click 'Install app and get OAuth token'.
6. Pick the team where you want this to work.
7. Copy the access token shown after install.

validate.successMessage: Token validated. {response.total} board(s) accessible to this app on {MIRO_ORG_NAME}.

errorHints.401: Token rejected. Token may be expired, revoked, or the app uninstalled from your team.
errorHints.403: Token missing required scopes. Make sure the app has at least 'boards:read'.
errorHints.404: Endpoint not found. Miro API may have changed; check for installer updates.
